title: 'oboth #0088
definition:
Oboth = "waterskins"

 1) undetermined site of an Israelite camp in the wilderness
    (perhaps at east boundary of Moab)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Oboth = "waterskins"

 1) undetermined site of an Israelite camp in the wilderness
    (perhaps at east boundary of Moab)

    NASB:  water-skins, a place in Edom
